name: Squid Teriyaki
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Squid, cleaned and cut into
recipeInstructions:
1. To make the teriyaki sauce, combine all ingredients except cornstarch in a bowl.
2. Reserve half of the sauce and marinate the squid with the other half for 1 hour.
3. Prepare the grill by skewering the squid pieces and tentacles.
4. Heat the reserved teriyaki sauce in a saucepan until it begins to boil.
5. Add cornstarch dissolved in a little water, then remove from heat once the sauce thickens.
6. Grill the squid for 2 to 3 minutes per side, depending on the heat, and turn it over.
7. Baste with the teriyaki sauce one last time before removing the skewers from the grill.
8. Serve over rice accompanied by any remaining sauce.
